sentences.en: We saw a spike in organic installs after the influencer campaign went live.
sentences.zh: 网红推广上线后，我们看到自然安装量出现了一波高峰。

sentences.en: The payback period on this channel is too long for our current cash position.
sentences.zh: 这个渠道的回本周期对我们当前的现金状况来说太长了。

sentences.en: Let us segment users by their first-week behavior to predict long-term value.
sentences.zh: 我们按用户首周行为来分群，以预测长期价值。

sentences.en: The viral coefficient is below one, so growth will not be self-sustaining.
sentences.zh: 病毒系数低于1，增长不会自我维持。

sentences.en: We should double down on the channel with the lowest blended CPA.
sentences.zh: 我们应该加大投入到综合获客成本最低的渠道。

example.en: A payback period under six months is ideal for paid channels.
example.zh: 付费渠道的回本周期在六个月以内是理想的。

example.en: We segment users by trading frequency and asset size.
example.zh: 我们按交易频次和资产规模对用户进行分群。

example.en: A viral coefficient above one means each user brings in more than one new user.
example.zh: 病毒系数大于1意味着每个用户能带来超过一个新用户。

example.en: The blended cost per acquisition across all channels is $45.
example.zh: 所有渠道的综合获客成本是45美元。

example.en: Organic growth is more sustainable than paid growth in the long run.
example.zh: 从长远来看，自然增长比付费增长更可持续。

sentences.en: The crash rate on the latest build exceeded our acceptable threshold.
sentences.zh: 最新版本的崩溃率超过了我们可接受的阈值。

sentences.en: We need to instrument the new feature before rolling it out to production.
sentences.zh: 在正式发布前，我们需要为新功能做好埋点。

sentences.en: Session duration increased by 20% after we added the watchlist widget.
sentences.zh: 添加自选股组件后，会话时长增长了20%。

sentences.en: The error rate spiked during peak trading hours yesterday.
sentences.zh: 昨天交易高峰时段错误率急剧上升。

sentences.en: We should deprecate the old API endpoint by the end of Q2.
sentences.zh: 我们应该在Q2结束前废弃旧的API端点。

example.en: We set a threshold of 0.1% for acceptable crash rates.
example.zh: 我们把可接受的崩溃率阈值设定在0.1%。

example.en: Make sure to instrument all key user actions for analytics.
example.zh: 确保对所有关键用户行为进行埋点以支持分析。

example.en: We plan to deprecate the v1 API and migrate all clients to v2.
example.zh: 我们计划废弃v1 API，将所有客户端迁移到v2。

example.en: Average session duration is a proxy for user engagement.
example.zh: 平均会话时长是衡量用户参与度的代理指标。

example.en: We will do a phased rollout starting with 10% of users.
example.zh: 我们将分阶段发布，先覆盖10%的用户。

sentences.en: The Federal Reserve signaled a hawkish stance at its latest meeting.
sentences.zh: 美联储在最近一次会议上释放了鹰派信号。

sentences.en: Short sellers are building positions ahead of the earnings release.
sentences.zh: 空头在财报发布前正在建仓。

sentences.en: The yield curve inversion has historically preceded recessions.
sentences.zh: 收益率曲线倒挂在历史上是衰退的先兆。

sentences.en: Free cash flow is a more reliable indicator than reported net income.
sentences.zh: 自由现金流比报告的净利润更可靠。

sentences.en: The stock broke through its 200-day moving average on heavy volume.
sentences.zh: 该股在放量情况下突破了200日均线。

example.en: Hawkish comments from the central bank pushed bond yields higher.
example.zh: 央行的鹰派言论推高了债券收益率。

example.en: An inverted yield curve often signals an economic downturn.
example.zh: 收益率曲线倒挂通常预示着经济下行。

example.en: Short sellers profit when the stock price declines.
example.zh: 空头在股价下跌时获利。

example.en: Companies with strong free cash flow can fund growth without dilution.
example.zh: 自由现金流充裕的公司可以在不稀释股权的情况下支持增长。

example.en: The 50-day moving average acts as a dynamic support level.
example.zh: 50日均线起到动态支撑位的作用。

sentences.en: I need you to take ownership of the retention workstream this quarter.
sentences.zh: 我需要你本季度负责留存方向的工作。

sentences.en: The skip-level meeting revealed some concerns about workload distribution.
sentences.zh: 越级面谈揭示了一些关于工作量分配的担忧。

sentences.en: Please escalate any blockers to me directly instead of waiting for the standup.
sentences.zh: 有阻塞问题请直接升级给我，不要等站会。

sentences.en: We are creating a dedicated task force to fix the signup conversion drop.
sentences.zh: 我们正在组建一个专项小组来解决注册转化下降的问题。

sentences.en: His ability to influence without authority makes him an effective leader.
sentences.zh: 他无需职权就能施加影响力的能力使他成为一名高效的领导者。

example.en: Taking ownership means being accountable for both outcomes and process.
example.zh: 承担ownership意味着对结果和过程都负责。

example.en: Skip-level meetings help senior leaders understand frontline challenges.
example.zh: 越级面谈帮助高层了解一线挑战。

example.en: If the issue is not resolved in 24 hours, escalate it to the VP.
example.zh: 如果问题在24小时内未解决，就上报给副总裁。

example.en: The CEO formed a task force to address the compliance gap.
example.zh: CEO组建了一个专项小组来解决合规缺口。

example.en: Great product managers rely on influence rather than formal authority.
example.zh: 优秀的产品经理依靠影响力而非正式权力。

sentences.en: We are pursuing a land-and-expand strategy with enterprise clients.
sentences.zh: 我们正在对企业客户采取先落地再扩展的策略。

sentences.en: The regulatory landscape in Hong Kong is evolving rapidly.
sentences.zh: 香港的监管环境正在快速演变。

sentences.en: First-mover advantage only matters if you can sustain the lead.
sentences.zh: 先发优势只有在你能保持领先时才重要。

sentences.en: We need to build strategic partnerships to enter the mainland market.
sentences.zh: 我们需要建立战略合作伙伴关系来进入大陆市场。

sentences.en: The opportunity cost of not acting now exceeds the risk of failure.
sentences.zh: 现在不行动的机会成本超过了失败的风险。

example.en: The land-and-expand model starts with a small deal and grows over time.
example.zh: 先落地再扩展的模式从小订单开始，随时间增长。

example.en: Regulatory compliance is a prerequisite for operating in financial markets.
example.zh: 合规是在金融市场运营的前提条件。

example.en: Being the first-mover gave us brand recognition but not a lasting moat.
example.zh: 先发优势让我们获得了品牌认知，但并没有形成持久的护城河。

example.en: Strategic partnerships accelerate market entry in unfamiliar regions.
example.zh: 战略合作伙伴关系能加速在陌生区域的市场进入。

example.en: The opportunity cost of building in-house is the time lost to shipping.
example.zh: 自建的机会成本是延迟交付所损失的时间。
